stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 file 3.6.
Given the following information, determine the one engine inoperative flight-path gradient.

Take-Off Mass: 4375 lb
Airport elevation: 4000 ft
OAT: +22°C
Tailwind: 10 kt
Climb speed: 92 KIAS, (99 KTAS)
Flaps: Up
Gear: Up
Power: Take-off
Inoperative Engine Feathered
